content: Just as human language learners use explicit reflective vocabulary practice to build durable metacognitive awareness of their writing gaps, an LLM can be fine-tuned to embed graded reflective lexical prompts of the sort taught in high English curricula into the Self-Refine iterative feedback loop to produce more contextually appropriate, metacognitively grounded output for communication tasks. This combines lexical language learning pedagogy with LLM iterative refinement to fix the common problem of generic, uncontextualized feedback in current Self-Refine frameworks.
